parameters.apprise_url_plus: humhubs://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own HumHub destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise humhubs:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a HumHub post API JSON body and post it to your HumHub instance (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"data":{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment HumHub destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your HumHub post API (no Apprise)

container_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub container ID

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub host

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub password

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HumHub user
